title: gipool
description:
gipool是一个用于查询原神历史卡池、每一个角色的UP历史和距今未UP天数的控制台程序。
gipool is a CLI app which can use for querying Genshin Impact wish pool history and UP history of each character, even days since last UP.

title: Anemo LockWizard
description:
Anemo LockWizard 可以将你自己想要的字符串构造成一个磁贴，你可以将其放置在锁屏界面上。对于电脑端，它还支持将必应壁纸设置为锁屏壁纸，并将对应的壁纸配文设为磁贴。手机端由于权限问题，只能将必应壁纸先下载下来，再设为壁纸。
Anemo LockWizard allows you to build a tile with any string you want and place it on the lock screen. On PC, it also supports setting Bing wallpapers as lock screen wallpapers and displaying the corresponding caption as a tile. On mobile, due to permission restrictions, it can only download Bing wallpapers and set them as the wallpaper.

title: DPIDDC
description:
DPIDDC 即 DigitalProductId Decoder Console Edition，它会将当前系统注册表中的 DigitalProductId 键的数值解码为产品密钥。也支持通过命令行解密任意来源的其它 DigitalProductId 数值。
DPIDDC stands for DigitalProductId Decoder Console Edition. It decodes the DigitalProductId value in the current system registry into a product key. It also supports decoding arbitrary DigitalProductId values from other sources via the command line.

title: SignTool
description:
这个 SignTool 与 Windows SDK 包含的 SignTool 不同，这个 SignTool 只能对 .exe .dll .sys 文件进行签名，从而可以在仅开启了测试模式的 Windows RT 设备上运行，且只能使用内置写死的一个私钥进行签名，但是更加简单易用。它是 .NET Framework 4.5 写的，所以它本身被签过名之后，就也可在仅开启了测试模式的 Windows RT 上运行了。
This SignTool is different from the one included in the Windows SDK. It can only sign .exe, .dll, and .sys files so they can run on Windows RT devices with test mode enabled, and it can only sign with a hardcoded built-in private key, but it is much simpler to use. It is written in .NET Framework 4.5, so once signed itself, it can also run on Windows RT with test mode enabled.

title: App Installer For Windows 8.x Reset
description:
App Installer For Windows 8.x Reset 是 Angra 做的给 Windows 8.x 用的图形化 Appx 软件包安装程序，可以批量安装多个软件包，且能自动将软件包数字签名公钥添加到信任区，省去手动导入证书的繁琐操作。现在支持 Windows RT 了。
App Installer For Windows 8.x Reset is a graphical Appx package installer for Windows 8.x made by Angra. It supports batch installation of multiple packages and automatically adds the digital signature public keys to the trusted store, eliminating the need to manually import certificates. Windows RT is now supported.

title: Sparkborne
description:
Sparkborne 可以管理当前系统的开机启动项目。对于 Windows RT，你可以将 Sparkborne 放入任务计划程序，在每次用户登录时运行，带上 -startup 参数和“使用最高权限运行”，这样它就会将本来 Windows RT 不启动的注册表和 shell:startup 文件夹中放置的启动项都启动一遍，本来 Windows RT 想要开机自启，只能放进任务计划或者注册成服务，而很多移植的桌面应用设置开机自启还是放进注册表或 shell:startup 文件夹。
Sparkborne can manage the startup items of the current system. On Windows RT, you can add Sparkborne to Task Scheduler to run at every user login with the -startup parameter and 'Run with highest privileges', so it will launch all startup items placed in the registry and shell:startup folder that Windows RT would otherwise ignore. On Windows RT, programs can only auto-start by being added to Task Scheduler or registered as a service, but many ported desktop apps still place their startup entries in the registry or shell:startup folder.

title: Reversed Projector
description:
Reversed Projector 是一个基于 WinRT/WinJS 的接收 DLNA 投屏的程序。 Windows 8.x 的“设备”超级按钮只能发送投屏、不能接收，需要接收一般都是使用 Windows Media Player，而 Windows RT 默认不包含 Windows Media Player，所以你可以用这个应用软件接收投屏。
Reversed Projector is a WinRT/WinJS-based application for receiving DLNA screen casts. The "Devices" charm in Windows 8.x can only send screen casts but not receive them. Receiving typically requires Windows Media Player, which is not included by default on Windows RT, so you can use this app to receive screen casts.

title: Simple Monitor
description:
Simple Monitor 是一个无 UI 摄像头应用软件，没有拍照功能，只能监视画面，可以用于将采集卡的画面全屏显示出来。底部上滑可以切换摄像头设备。
Simple Monitor is a UI-less camera application with no photo-taking functionality. It can only display the live view, and can be used to display a capture card's feed in full screen. Swipe up from the bottom to switch camera devices.

title: Monsieur Vérité
description:
Monsieur Vérité 是一个接收共享屏幕截图的程序，使用“共享”超级按钮将屏幕截图共享给 Monsieur Vérité，Monsieur Vérité就会自动将截图保存在图片库中。
Monsieur Vérité is a program for receiving shared screenshots. Share a screenshot to Monsieur Vérité using the "Share" charm, and Monsieur Vérité will automatically save the screenshot to your Pictures library.
